name: Inferno Zaura
leaderSkill: Darkest Blaze Fire and Dark element fellows (Except Demigod grade) ignore defense +1.25% x rank
basicAttack: 100% dmg Base stat increase : HP +60% , Def +50% , Atk +25%
skill1: Sunder Flare CD 15s Smash axe to the ground and cause flame ground in landing area for 5s. Dealing 141% every 0.5s Reduce damage taken by 50% while using the skill
skill2: Chariot of Fire CD 12s Jump to the air and rotate swiftly with axe attack. Dealing 413% damage every 0.25s Then landing attack smash the ground dealing same damage with larger AoE. Reduce damage taken by 50% while using the skill
skill3: Whirlwind of Flame CD 20s Quickly spin with axe causing flame whirlwind. Dealing 201% damage every 0.5s continuously to enemy inside the area. Reduce damage taken by 50% while using the skill
awakenSkill: Warcry Explosion [Unlock at Rank 1] CD 120s Unleash the anger around yourself. Dealing 740% damage and cause this fellow to enter 'Awakening' state for 30s [Awakening] Knockback immune , Attack speed +50% . Basic attack damage +300%, skill attack damage +200%

rankEffects.rank4: Overheat When got hit, cause an explosion dealing 734% damage around yourself (+66% per rank ,+134% additional at Rank 9) (CD 30s) Also grant herself 15s buff that increase block rate by 75%
rankEffects.rank5: Chaos Quake Using Sunder Flare will cause many fire pillar to erupt around yourself. Deal 3 hit for total of 196%(+17% per rank , +49% additional at rank 9) damage
rankEffects.rank6: The Huntress Damage increase +10% and Boss damage increase +1.5% (+0.5% per rank) Every 10s, grant Swordman and Scout fellow a 'Huntress' buff. Which increase crit rate and crit damage by 10% for 10s
rankEffects.rank7: Chaos Rush Spawn 5 fireballs when using Chariot of Fire that fly to random enemy. Each dealing 225%(+20% per rank, +96% at rank 9) damage
rankEffects.rank9: Inferno Berserker All skill attack deal additional hit equal to 29%(+2% per rank, +7% at rank 9) dark damage. This damage increase further by how much HP is lost. Up to 99% After using skill, grant all fellow and player 'Inferno Berserker' buff for 5s.  [Inferno Berserker] For Player : Imbue weapon with Fire and Dark element. Increase skill damage by 30%. Increase damage to Holy  & Earth type enemy by additional 20% Fire & Dark element fellows : Increase damage by 50%

name: Seol Hwa
basicAttack: 100% dmg. Grant herself a 'Recharge' stack every time she using skill. Increase Penetration Rate, Block and Evasion rate by 0.5% per stack (Max 10 stacks) All stack lost on death
skill1: Windfall CD 8s Attack all target in projectile trajectory Throw a mystic orb that travel forward for 1s, then travel back to you in 1s. Dealing 240% Earth damage every 0.3s to enemy in pathway
skill2: Trance Illusion CD 10s Attack all target in 2m radius Emit illusion aura around yourself. Dealing 929% Dark damage to all enemies around target area and put them to 'Confusion' for 5s. Reduce hit rate by 30% and reduce damage done to owner by 10%
skill3: Tale of The Moon CD 40s Self buff. Summon a clone that replicate all Seolhwa skills for 30s. It only deal with 50% of base power. And also inherit 'Recharge' stacks. The clone cannot be targeted, and do not receive any damage.

rankEffects.rank4: Increase Maximum HP  Increase HP by 50%
rankEffects.rank7: Trigram Charm Stance When 'Recharge' stack reaching 2 and 5, unlock new ability to use  [2 Stacks - Restict Area] CD 10s Evoke a fire charm's power. Dealing 1045% Fire damage to all enemies in 3m radius around yourself and push them away by 1.5m  [5 Stacks - Weather Art: The Tri Diasters] CD 14s Place a lightning charm to call down lightning strike to enemy in that area for 4s. Dealing 301% x 8 Lightning damage and 'Shock' them for 10s. Taking 10% DoT every second, 10% chance to be stunned when try using any skill
rankEffects.rank9: Fork Tale Art Stance When 'Recharge' stack reaching 3 and 6, unlock new ability to use  [3 Stacks - Divine Spirit Art] CD 13s Summon Dragon spirit to strike enemies in 3x8m frontal area. Dealing 428% x 3 Ice damage and inflict 'Seizure' to enemy hit for 10s. Reduce Defense,Block and Evasion rate by 10%  [6 Stacks - Flamboyance] CD 16s Perfrom an exorcism to purify the defile soul in 2x7m frontal area. Dealing 328% x 5 Holy damage and inflict 'Purified' to enemy for 15s. Increase damage taken from caster.owner and all of their fellows by 40%

name: Arlene Berg
basicAttack: 100% dmg Ignore 20% def 25% chance to put herself in 'Frenzy' state
skill1: Fellow Great Swing CD 10s Attack all target in 3.5m radius around yourself Spin your sword to attack enemy around you. Dealing 215% x 3 damage
skill2: Fellow Zornhau CD 7s Attack target in 3x3m frontal area Landing overhead smash. Dealing 697% damage
skill3: Fellow Great Finish CD 15s Attack all target in 4m radius around yourself Leap and then smash greatsword to the ground. Dealing 994% damage  50% chance to 'stun' enemy on hit
